commit.name: Kanban Task Board
commit.description: Column-based task board with task cards and state management
commit.prompt:
Build a Kanban-style task board with 3 columns: To Do, In Progress, Done.

Each column:
- Has a header with column name and task count
- Contains a vertical list of task cards
- Has an "Add Task" button at the bottom

Each task card displays:
- Task title (editable on double-click or via edit button)
- Priority badge (low/medium/high with color coding from design tokens)
- Assignee avatar or initials
- Due date (if set)
- A move button or dropdown to move the task to another column

Requirements:
- Tasks can be moved between columns via move controls (buttons or select dropdown)
- New tasks start in "To Do" column
- "Add Task" shows an inline form with title input and priority selector
- Track total tasks and completed count in a summary bar at the top
- Initial tasks come from props; real-time updates from other team members arrive via stream
- Call the taskUpdate action when a task is moved, edited, or created
- Use design system CSS variables for all colors, spacing, and shadows

tasks.description: Array of tasks with id, title, priority (low/medium/high), assignee initials, column ID, and optional dueDate

columns.description: Column definitions: [{id: "todo", name: "To Do"}, {id: "in-progress", name: "In Progress"}, {id: "done", name: "Done"}]

taskUpdate.label: Task Updated
taskUpdate.description: Called when a task is moved, edited, or created. Payload: { action, taskId, data }

stream.description: Real-time task updates from other team members

taskChanged.description: A task was moved, edited, or created by another user — update it in the board

getBoardState.description: Current board state including any unsaved edits

issues.description: New tasks should be created in the 'To Do' column by default, but the current implementation allows adding tasks to any column via the 'Add Task' button. The original requirement specifies 'New tasks start in "To Do" column'
issues.fix: New tasks should be created in the 'To Do' column by default, but the current implementation allows adding tasks to any column via the 'Add Task' button. The original requirement specifies 'New tasks start in "To Do" column'

issues.description: Edit task title via double-click is not implemented — only single-click to enter edit mode is available. The original request specifies 'editable on double-click or via edit button'
issues.fix: Edit task title via double-click is not implemented — only single-click to enter edit mode is available. The original request specifies 'editable on double-click or via edit button'

issues.description: Edit button for task titles is missing — only clickable text is provided for editing
issues.fix: Edit button for task titles is missing — only clickable text is provided for editing

issues.description: Task title editing does not persist the title change in the action payload — the taskUpdate action is called with column data only, not with the new title value
issues.fix: Task title editing does not persist the title change in the action payload — the taskUpdate action is called with column data only, not with the new title value

issues.description: Task title text element (line 242-253) is clickable but not keyboard accessible — needs role='button', tabindex='0', and Enter/Space key handlers
issues.fix: Task title text element (line 242-253) is clickable but not keyboard accessible — needs role='button', tabindex='0', and Enter/Space key handlers

issues.description: Task title editing triggered by click with no indication to screen readers that it's interactive — add aria-label or tooltip
issues.fix: Task title editing triggered by click with no indication to screen readers that it's interactive — add aria-label or tooltip

issues.fix: Move to column dropdown (line 276) trigger button has no aria-label or aria-expanded to indicate dropdown state

issues.fix: Column count badge (line 192) is not announced as part of column header — wrap in semantic list structure or use aria-label for context

issues.description: Due date emoji (📅 line 270) may not be announced by screen readers — use aria-label='Due date:' instead of relying on emoji
issues.fix: Due date emoji (📅 line 270) may not be announced by screen readers — use aria-label='Due date:' instead of relying on emoji

issues.fix: Task card container (line 206) lacks semantic structure — should use article role with aria-label containing task title

evaluation.critique: The component has incomplete implementation (code cuts off mid-render) and missing critical Kanban functionality like drag-and-drop, column rendering, and task cards. While design tokens are mostly used correctly, the layout is broken due to truncation and lacks responsive column structure. Polish is weak with minimal hover/focus states and no loading/disabled state handling.
